Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting prediabetes or impaired glucose regulation, and low hemoglobin, indicating mild anemia. Platelet distribution width is increased, which may reflect platelet size variability but platelet count is normal. Renal function, electrolytes, and other hematological parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further evaluation of anemia and glycemic control are recommended.
